auth.loginError: Check the email and password, then try again.
auth.welcomeText: Sign in as a traveler, provider admin, or platform super admin and continue your coastal tourism workflow.
auth.partnerSummary: Partner accounts become provider admins. You can manage offers, booking requests, profile content, and tracking for your concerned role.
hero.subtitle: فنادق ومراقد وإقامات جامعية ومطاعم وأنشطة وخطط ذكية للساحل الجزائري.
home.discoverText: Browse coastal wilayas by stay, food, and activities with real provider-style cards.
home.reserveText: Open details, compare photos and amenities, then send a reservation request with clear tracking.
home.planText: Generate an itinerary from destination, mood, duration, budget, and selected offers.
home.manageText: Provider admins publish offers, review requests, and track bookings from a focused workspace.
listing.intro: Search and filter coastal providers by wilaya, category, budget, rating, and provider type.
listing.mapText: Providers can post offers, manage calendars, and receive reservation requests.
listing.searchPlaceholder: ابحث عن فندق، مطعم، نشاط، مدينة...
facility.confirmationText: Provider admins track requests from their booking management dashboard.
facility.ownerText: Providers manage offers, availability, comments, exchange-aware prices, and reservation requests from their dashboard.
booking.title: إتمام الحجز
booking.providerNote: New request from offer detail page
reservations.emptyText: Open a hotel, restaurant, or activity profile and book it.
activity.title: سلة الخطة الذكية
activity.generateText: استعمل الفنادق والمطاعم والنشاطات المحفوظة كسياق لمسار كامل.
activity.emptyText: أضف بطاقات من أين ننام أو أين نأكل أو الأنشطة.
smart.title: إنشاء خطة ساحلية ذكية
settings.label: Label
settings.displayText: AJIZOUR keeps your language, currency, exchange rates, auth session, bookings, and smart plans ready between visits.
profile.providerText: Manage hotel, restaurant, activity, entertainer, or facility pages that appear across AJIZOUR.
profile.travelerText: Reserve coastal stays, restaurants, activities, and keep smart plans in one place.
contact.title: تواصل مع عجيزور
contact.name: الاسم
contact.subject: الموضوع
newsletter.title: Coastal newsletter
newsletter.text: Receive updates about coastal offers, providers, and smart trip ideas.
inbox.title: Contact and newsletter inbox
reset.title: Reset your password
reset.sent: If the email exists, a reset email was sent.
reset.updated: Password updated. You can login now.
detail.sleepDurationText: Suitable for hotels, dormitories, university residences, weekends, and seasonal travel.
detail.sleepCapacityText: Capacity depends on room type, dormitory bed count, or residence availability.
detail.sleepPolicy1: Identity may be required at arrival
detail.sleepPolicy2: Provider confirms availability before final acceptance
detail.sleepPolicy3: Cancellation can be requested from booking tracking
detail.foodDurationText: Best for lunch, dinner, family tables, seafood plans, and local cuisine stops.
detail.foodCapacityText: Restaurant owners manage table requests, menus, and confirmation state.
detail.foodPolicy1: Table requests are confirmed by the restaurant
detail.foodPolicy2: Arrival time can be adjusted by the owner
detail.foodPolicy3: Large groups may require provider approval
detail.activityDurationText: Designed for clubs, facilities, guides, beach activities, boat tours, diving, quad, and entertainment providers.
detail.activityCapacityText: Activity providers confirm capacity, weather readiness, and safety conditions.
detail.activityPolicy1: Activity may depend on weather or safety conditions
detail.activityPolicy2: Provider can confirm, reschedule, or cancel
detail.activityPolicy3: Bring required documents or equipment when listed
